market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: £14 Cheaper! Garden Home + Free Parking Near City (£136)
4-Guest Garden House: City Centre Walk, No Car Fee
Charming Garden Retreat with Free Parking & City Access
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this charming 4-guest entire home offering rare garden access and free parking, perfectly located to walk to the city center. Priced 12% below the local market median (£136 vs £155), this highly-rated (4.9/5 ★ ★ ★ ★ ★) property has served 233 guests who praised its tranquil garden setting and convenient parking. Despite its competitive rate, your current 29% 90-day occupancy lags behind the cohort median of 47.8% — showcasing untapped potential. Enjoy the unique combination of private outdoor space in a city listing and the assurance of free on-site parking without compromising location (just a walk away from the city core). Ideal for urban explorers who want garden serenity at a price that outcompetes 75% of local listings in this price bracket. Recent guests highlighted the garden's appeal — one reviewer called it 'the best outdoor space I've seen in a city listing!' Upgrade your listing's visibility with clear, high-res photos of the garden and parking space to match your price's competitiveness.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a wide-angle garden photo for cover image — outdoor space is a high-value feature in this market and your own reviews highlight its importance. Follow with full exterior facing the street to showcase parking availability.
key_diagnosis: Description is functionally nonexistent (score 1/10), missing 233-review insights and 4.9 rating validation that could attract 183 additional bookings (64 open nights x £136 = £8720 in lost revenue)
Garden and parking features aren't properly tagged in amenities section — despite being in title, these high-value amenities aren't explicitly listed to trigger algorithmic visibility
Current 29.3% occupancy is 39% below cohort median (47.8%) despite 12% price discount — indicates price is insufficient compensation for perception gaps in other areas
analysis.outreach_hook: Despite a 12% lower nightly rate than the market median (£136 vs £155), your 90-day occupancy is significantly below average at 29% booked (64 open nights when cohorts average 47.8% occupancy)
